{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Videographer / Mobile Videographer",
  "description": "Turf Arena Sports Center is a dynamic sports and recreational facility dedicated to promoting grassroots sports development, youth empowerment, and community engagement. We provide a safe, inclusive, and high-quality environment where individuals of all ages can train, compete, and grow through sports.&nbsp;At Turf Arena, we specialize in organizing sporting activities, training programs, tournaments, and community-based initiatives that foster talent development, teamwork, discipline, and healthy living. Our facility serves as a hub for athletes, fitness enthusiasts, schools, and organizations seeking professional sports experiences.&nbsp;Beyond sports, Turf Arena is committed to creating social impact through initiatives that engage youth, women, and underserved communities using sports as a tool for education, empowerment, and positive change.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Videographer / Mobile Videographer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Are you passionate about capturing powerful sports moments and creating engaging content?
	Turf Arena Sports Center is looking for a creative and skilled Videographer (or Mobile Videographer) to join our team!


Job Overview


	You will be responsible for capturing, editing, and producing high-quality video content that showcases our sports activities, events, and community impact across digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Record high-quality videos of matches, training sessions, and events
	Create engaging short-form content (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)
	Edit videos for social media, promotions, and marketing campaigns
	Capture behind-the-scenes and storytelling content
	Collaborate with the media/marketing team on content ideas
	Ensure quick turnaround time for content delivery


Requirements


	Proven experience as a videographer or mobile videographer
	Skilled in video editing apps (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, InShot, etc.)
	Ability to shoot high-quality content using a smartphone or camera
	Good understanding of social media trends and content styles
	Creativity and strong storytelling ability
	Must be reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented
	Passion for sports is a strong advantage


What We&rsquo;re Looking For


	Someone creative, fast, and consistent
	Ability to work during weekends (match days/events)
	A team player with good communication skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio (or sample videos/Instagram page) to:&nbsp;Turfarenasportscenter@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquiries, send a WhatsApp message to: 081898288868.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-13",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-28",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Turf Arena Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197345"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Videographer / Mobile Videographer Job at Turf Arena Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Turf Arena Sports Center is a dynamic sports and recreational facility dedicated to promoting grassroots sports development, youth empowerment, and community engagement. We provide a safe, inclusive, and high-quality environment where individuals of all ages can train, compete, and grow through sports. At Turf Arena, we specialize in organizing sporting activities, training programs, tournaments, and community-based initiatives that foster talent development, teamwork, discipline, and healthy living. Our facility serves as a hub for athletes, fitness enthusiasts, schools, and organizations seeking professional sports experiences. Beyond sports, Turf Arena is committed to creating social impact through initiatives that engage youth, women, and underserved communities using sports as a tool for education, empowerment, and positive change.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Videographer / Mobile Videographer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Are you passionate about capturing powerful sports moments and creating engaging content?
	Turf Arena Sports Center is looking for a creative and skilled Videographer (or Mobile Videographer) to join our team!


Job Overview


	You will be responsible for capturing, editing, and producing high-quality video content that showcases our sports activities, events, and community impact across digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Record high-quality videos of matches, training sessions, and events
	Create engaging short-form content (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)
	Edit videos for social media, promotions, and marketing campaigns
	Capture behind-the-scenes and storytelling content
	Collaborate with the media/marketing team on content ideas
	Ensure quick turnaround time for content delivery


Requirements


	Proven experience as a videographer or mobile videographer
	Skilled in video editing apps (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, InShot, etc.)
	Ability to shoot high-quality content using a smartphone or camera
	Good understanding of social media trends and content styles
	Creativity and strong storytelling ability
	Must be reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented
	Passion for sports is a strong advantage


What We’re Looking For


	Someone creative, fast, and consistent
	Ability to work during weekends (match days/events)
	A team player with good communication skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio (or sample videos/Instagram page) to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, send a WhatsApp message to:    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Guest Service Agent",
  "description": "Protea Hotel By Marriot Lagos Kuramo Waters - Experience beautiful beachfront views from our Hotel situated along Kuramo Beach. This serene getaway is ideal for business or leisure guests alike. With state-of-the-art guest rooms and amenities, we ensure a getaway that keeps you in touch with the world while providing a relaxing stay.

We have 60 luxurious rooms with in-room tea/coffee-making facilities and turn-down packages. Protea Hotel Lagos Kuramo Waters facilities include complimentary Wi-Fi access, a gym, a swimming pool, a restaurant, a bar and other commendable amenities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Guest Service Agent

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Guest Service Agent is responsible for providing excellent customer service to hotel guests by managing check-ins and check-outs, handling guest requests, and ensuring a pleasant and comfortable stay.
	The role serves as the first point of contact for guests and represents the hotel&rsquo;s image and service standards.


Key Responsibilities
Guest Reception and Check-In/Check-Out:


	Welcome guests warmly upon arrival.
	Handle guest check-in and check-out procedures efficiently.
	Verify guest identification and reservation details.
	Issue room keys and provide information about hotel facilities and services.


Guest Assistance and Customer Service:


	Respond promptly to guest inquiries, requests, and complaints.
	Provide information about hotel amenities, services, and local attractions.
	Ensure all guest needs are handled in a professional and friendly manner.


Reservations and Booking Management:


	Manage room reservations through the hotel reservation system.
	Confirm bookings via phone, email, or online platforms.
	Update room availability and maintain accurate reservation records.


Communication and Coordination


	Communicate guest requests to housekeeping, maintenance, and other departments.
	Coordinate with hotel staff to ensure guest satisfaction.
	Maintain clear and accurate communication logs.


Billing and Payment Processing:


	Prepare guest bills and ensure accuracy.
	Process payments including cash, credit cards, and other payment methods.
	Maintain accurate financial records and receipts.


Front Desk Operations:


	Maintain a clean and organized front desk area.
	Ensure guest information is properly recorded in the hotel management system.
	Handle incoming phone calls and emails professionally.


Security and Safety:


	Follow hotel security and safety procedures.
	Monitor guest access and ensure compliance with hotel policies.
	Report suspicious activities or emergencies to management.


Requirements / Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related fields
	Previous experience in hotel front desk, customer service, or hospitality is an advantage.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Good computer skills and familiarity with hotel management software.
	Ability to work shifts, weekends, and holidays.
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hospitalityresources68@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Guest Service Agent Job at Protea Hotel




        
    

        
        Protea Hotel By Marriot Lagos Kuramo Waters - Experience beautiful beachfront views from our Hotel situated along Kuramo Beach. This serene getaway is ideal for business or leisure guests alike. With state-of-the-art guest rooms and amenities, we ensure a getaway that keeps you in touch with the world while providing a relaxing stay.

We have 60 luxurious rooms with in-room tea/coffee-making facilities and turn-down packages. Protea Hotel Lagos Kuramo Waters facilities include complimentary Wi-Fi access, a gym, a swimming pool, a restaurant, a bar and other commendable amenities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Guest Service Agent
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Guest Service Agent is responsible for providing excellent customer service to hotel guests by managing check-ins and check-outs, handling guest requests, and ensuring a pleasant and comfortable stay.
	The role serves as the first point of contact for guests and represents the hotel’s image and service standards.


Key Responsibilities
Guest Reception and Check-In/Check-Out:


	Welcome guests warmly upon arrival.
	Handle guest check-in and check-out procedures efficiently.
	Verify guest identification and reservation details.
	Issue room keys and provide information about hotel facilities and services.


Guest Assistance and Customer Service:


	Respond promptly to guest inquiries, requests, and complaints.
	Provide information about hotel amenities, services, and local attractions.
	Ensure all guest needs are handled in a professional and friendly manner.


Reservations and Booking Management:


	Manage room reservations through the hotel reservation system.
	Confirm bookings via phone, email, or online platforms.
	Update room availability and maintain accurate reservation records.


Communication and Coordination


	Communicate guest requests to housekeeping, maintenance, and other departments.
	Coordinate with hotel staff to ensure guest satisfaction.
	Maintain clear and accurate communication logs.


Billing and Payment Processing:


	Prepare guest bills and ensure accuracy.
	Process payments including cash, credit cards, and other payment methods.
	Maintain accurate financial records and receipts.


Front Desk Operations:


	Maintain a clean and organized front desk area.
	Ensure guest information is properly recorded in the hotel management system.
	Handle incoming phone calls and emails professionally.


Security and Safety:


	Follow hotel security and safety procedures.
	Monitor guest access and ensure compliance with hotel policies.
	Report suspicious activities or emergencies to management.


Requirements / Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related fields
	Previous experience in hotel front desk, customer service, or hospitality is an advantage.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Good computer skills and familiarity with hotel management software.
	Ability to work shifts, weekends, and holidays.
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Manager",
  "description": "Reckitt Benckiser is the world&#39;s leading consumer health and hygiene company. Every day, across 60 countries, we work with the best people to challenge conventional thinking and strive to find even better ways to give people innovative solutions for healthier lives and happier homes.

We trust people in what they do and we give full accountability and autonomy to make things happen. That&rsquo;s how we generate the game-changing ideas that built 19 iconic Powerbrands around the world, such as Nurofen, Strepsils, Mucinex, Dettol, Lysol, Finish and Vanish.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Manager - West Africa

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

About The Role


	In the dynamic world of logistics, are you the one who brings order and clarity to complexity? Reckitt is looking for a Logistics Manager who thrives in creating seamless operations.
	This role is your opportunity to make an impact on a large scale, overseeing regional logistics strategies and gaining insights across our global business.
	We offer a platform to develop your leadership skills alongside enhancing commercial accumen with global partners. Join us in a role that is pivotal to our supply chain&#39;s success and become a central figure in our continued growth.


Your Responsibilities


	SLA Set up with all service providers and KPIs managed within terms of agreement. KPIs to be in place for all transporters, clearing agents etc, reviewed and published every month.
	Play an active role in tendering process and drive costs as well as service improvements through the selection. KPI: Drive to ensure Global Tender is smooth and savings are derived
	Ensure all monthly accounts are managed and paid within agreed timelines. KPI: No outstanding payments to suppliers; measure on monthly basis and transparently.
	Ensure all tariffs and duties are correctly classified and paid accordingly.
	Clear trackers and KPIs in place for all FO, FI and WH activities. All properly managed and controlled with clear actions to meet Business expectations.
	All audit compliance in Logistics space are met, ensure all SOPs, work instructions are in place and reviewed regularly and strictly adhered to.
	Vehicle utilization for outbound deliverers, container utilization for imports
	Inbound &amp; Outbound freight optimization.
	Management and control of all 3P logistics suppliers within the operation.
	General Operational Excellence &amp; compliance
	Ensure full SQC adherence in Warehousing and Transportation
	Project Management of key cost and services improvement initiatives that result in efficiency improvements.


Requirements
The experience we&#39;re looking for:


	Relevant degree in Logistics, Engineering or a related field. Minimum of 3 years of experience in Warehousing and freight management, preferably within FMCG or Logistics companies.
	Solid experience in warehouse operations and the ability to blend commercial insight with technical expertise.
	Skills in continuous improvement, financial stewardship, and team development.
	A successful track record of working within the supply chain community and with external partners.
	Leadership qualities that encourage ownership and a sense of responsibility.
	An understanding of key performance indicators in service delivery, along with proficiency in data analytics and supply chain planning.


The skills for success


	Supply Chain Management, Business Partnership, Collaboration and partnership building, Relationship Management, Business accumen, Productivity management, Improve business processes, Advanced Analytics, Data Analytics, Supply Chain Planning, Logistics Management.

Logistics Manager Job at Reckitt Benckiser




        
    

        
        Reckitt Benckiser is the world's leading consumer health and hygiene company. Every day, across 60 countries, we work with the best people to challenge conventional thinking and strive to find even better ways to give people innovative solutions for healthier lives and happier homes.

We trust people in what they do and we give full accountability and autonomy to make things happen. That’s how we generate the game-changing ideas that built 19 iconic Powerbrands around the world, such as Nurofen, Strepsils, Mucinex, Dettol, Lysol, Finish and Vanish.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Manager - West Africa

Job Location: Lagos
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



About The Role


	In the dynamic world of logistics, are you the one who brings order and clarity to complexity? Reckitt is looking for a Logistics Manager who thrives in creating seamless operations.
	This role is your opportunity to make an impact on a large scale, overseeing regional logistics strategies and gaining insights across our global business.
	We offer a platform to develop your leadership skills alongside enhancing commercial accumen with global partners. Join us in a role that is pivotal to our supply chain's success and become a central figure in our continued growth.


Your Responsibilities


	SLA Set up with all service providers and KPIs managed within terms of agreement. KPIs to be in place for all transporters, clearing agents etc, reviewed and published every month.
	Play an active role in tendering process and drive costs as well as service improvements through the selection. KPI: Drive to ensure Global Tender is smooth and savings are derived
	Ensure all monthly accounts are managed and paid within agreed timelines. KPI: No outstanding payments to suppliers; measure on monthly basis and transparently.
	Ensure all tariffs and duties are correctly classified and paid accordingly.
	Clear trackers and KPIs in place for all FO, FI and WH activities. All properly managed and controlled with clear actions to meet Business expectations.
	All audit compliance in Logistics space are met, ensure all SOPs, work instructions are in place and reviewed regularly and strictly adhered to.
	Vehicle utilization for outbound deliverers, container utilization for imports
	Inbound & Outbound freight optimization.
	Management and control of all 3P logistics suppliers within the operation.
	General Operational Excellence & compliance
	Ensure full SQC adherence in Warehousing and Transportation
	Project Management of key cost and services improvement initiatives that result in efficiency improvements.


Requirements
The experience we're looking for:


	Relevant degree in Logistics, Engineering or a related field. Minimum of 3 years of experience in Warehousing and freight management, preferably within FMCG or Logistics companies.
	Solid experience in warehouse operations and the ability to blend commercial insight with technical expertise.
	Skills in continuous improvement, financial stewardship, and team development.
	A successful track record of working within the supply chain community and with external partners.
	Leadership qualities that encourage ownership and a sense of responsibility.
	An understanding of key performance indicators in service delivery, along with proficiency in data analytics and supply chain planning.


The skills for success


	Supply Chain Management, Business Partnership, Collaboration and partnership building, Relationship Management, Business accumen, Productivity management, Improve business processes, Advanced Analytics, Data Analytics, Supply Chain Planning, Logistics Management.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Manager",
  "description": "Ankor Pointe Integrated Limited, established in 2003 and based in Lagos, Nigeria, is a premier surface / sub-surface engineering and well services company specializing in oil and gas asset management. The company delivers integrated services including field studies, production solutions, and manpower consulting, serving major clients such as Shell, Total, and Chevron.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers&nbsp;

Job&nbsp;Description


	The Procurement Personnel is responsible for leading procurement operations to ensure the efficient, cost-effective, and timely sourcing of goods and services in support of engineering and oil &amp; gas projects.
	The role requires strong leadership capability, vendor management expertise, and the ability to align procurement activities with operational and project delivery needs.
	The ideal candidate must have strong experience in civil engineering or oil and gas environments, with proven ability to manage teams, drive performance, and understand team dynamics within a structured corporate setting.


Responsibilities


	Lead end-to-end procurement activities including sourcing, RFQs, tendering, negotiation, and contract management.
	Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with business and project objectives.
	Manage supplier relationships and ensure optimal performance in cost, quality, and delivery.
	Supervise and guide procurement team members, ensuring clear direction, accountability, and performance standards.
	Collaborate with engineering, operations, and project teams to understand procurement requirements and timelines.
	Evaluate bids and proposals to ensure best value and compliance with technical specifications.
	Monitor market trends, pricing, and supply risks within the oil &amp; gas and civil engineering sectors.
	Drive continuous improvement in procurement processes and cost optimization initiatives.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, contractual terms, and regulatory requirements.
	Provide leadership in resolving procurement-related issues and escalations.


Experience &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Supply Chain Management, Procurement, Business Administration, Engineering, or related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of relevant experience within civil engineering or oil &amp; gas industries.
	At least 4 years in a senior procurement or leadership role managing people and processes.
	Strong understanding of team dynamics and demonstrated ability to lead and develop teams.
	Experience in contract management, vendor negotiation, and strategic sourcing.
	Professional certification (e.g., CIPS) is an added advantage.
	Strong leadership, analytical, negotiation, and communication skills.
	Proficiency in procurement systems and MS Office tools.


Note:&nbsp;API is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants are considered without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or veteran status.",

Procurement Manager Job at Ankor Pointe Integrated Limited




        
    

        
        Ankor Pointe Integrated Limited, established in 2003 and based in Lagos, Nigeria, is a premier surface / sub-surface engineering and well services company specializing in oil and gas asset management. The company delivers integrated services including field studies, production solutions, and manpower consulting, serving major clients such as Shell, Total, and Chevron.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers 

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Procurement Personnel is responsible for leading procurement operations to ensure the efficient, cost-effective, and timely sourcing of goods and services in support of engineering and oil & gas projects.
	The role requires strong leadership capability, vendor management expertise, and the ability to align procurement activities with operational and project delivery needs.
	The ideal candidate must have strong experience in civil engineering or oil and gas environments, with proven ability to manage teams, drive performance, and understand team dynamics within a structured corporate setting.


Responsibilities


	Lead end-to-end procurement activities including sourcing, RFQs, tendering, negotiation, and contract management.
	Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with business and project objectives.
	Manage supplier relationships and ensure optimal performance in cost, quality, and delivery.
	Supervise and guide procurement team members, ensuring clear direction, accountability, and performance standards.
	Collaborate with engineering, operations, and project teams to understand procurement requirements and timelines.
	Evaluate bids and proposals to ensure best value and compliance with technical specifications.
	Monitor market trends, pricing, and supply risks within the oil & gas and civil engineering sectors.
	Drive continuous improvement in procurement processes and cost optimization initiatives.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, contractual terms, and regulatory requirements.
	Provide leadership in resolving procurement-related issues and escalations.


Experience & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Supply Chain Management, Procurement, Business Administration, Engineering, or related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of relevant experience within civil engineering or oil & gas industries.
	At least 4 years in a senior procurement or leadership role managing people and processes.
	Strong understanding of team dynamics and demonstrated ability to lead and develop teams.
	Experience in contract management, vendor negotiation, and strategic sourcing.
	Professional certification (e.g., CIPS) is an added advantage.
	Strong leadership, analytical, negotiation, and communication skills.
	Proficiency in procurement systems and MS Office tools.


Note: API is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants are considered without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or veteran status.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Savings and Mobilization Officer Job at Just Recruitment Agency
content:
Just Recruitment Agency specialized services that encompass a wide range of industries, including but not limited to IT, finance, sales, marketing, HR, and more. Whether your company operates in a niche market or a large-scale industry, our freelance recruitment agency has the expertise to source top talent that aligns with your specific requirements.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Savings and Mobilization Officer

Job Location: Satellite Town, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Savings & Deposit Mobilisation
	Recruit and onboard new savers, contributors, and investors into approved savings and investment products.
	Mobilise daily, weekly, and monthly
	Mobilise daily, weekly, and monthly contributions from individuals, traders, cooperatives, and SMEs.
	Educate customers on available financial products and their benefits.


Customer Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients to encourage repeat savings and referrals.
	Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and feedback professionally.
	Ensure customer retention through regular follow-ups and engagement.


Field & Community Engagement:


	Conduct market visits, community outreach, and group sensitisation programs.
	Identify new savings clusters, associations, and cooperatives.
	Represent the organization at community meetings and empowerment programs


Collection & Documentation:


	Ensure all collections are properly receipted and recorded in line with company policy.
	Submit daily collection reports and documentation promptly.
	Ensure all funds are remitted to the company account without delay.


Reporting & Performance Tracking:


	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly mobilisation reports.
	Meet assigned savings mobilisation targets.
	Provide market feedback and product improvement suggestions.


Job Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	Minimum of OND, HND, or BSc in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Marketing, or related fields.
	Relevant experience may be considered in place of formal education.


Experience


	Minimum of 1–3 years of experience in savings mobilisation, sales, marketing, microfinance, or cooperative services.
	Experience in grassroots or market-based financial services is an advantage.
	Skills & Competencies
	Strong communication and persuasion skills.
	Basic knowledge of savings, investment, and financial products.
	Ability to work independently and meet targets.
	High level of integrity and trustworthiness.
	Good record-keeping and basic digital literacy.


Personal Attributes:


	Self-motivated and result-oriented.
	Presentable and professional.
	Familiar with local markets and communities.
	Willingness to work in the field


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 per month + Commission based on Financial Targets met.

Method of Application
